name: gpd-conventions
description: GPD convention lock management. Tools for querying, setting, validating, and comparing physics conventions across research phases, including ASSERT_CONVENTION validation. Every derivation artifact must carry at least one ASSERT_CONVENTION header that matches the project convention lock.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.

python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.
